author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 already landed (previous result comment dated 2026-05-19 15:06; src/tools/worktree.rs no longer calls std::env::set_current_dir on any path; 5 forensic tests including compile-time anti-regression grep). Phase 2 (thread worktree path through ToolContext, WorktreeGuard/Drop) is filed as #993. Closing as fixed for the Phase 1 scope. Forensic evidence: grep -n 'set_current_dir' src/tools/worktree.rs shows only doc comments, the production_code_contains_no_set_current_dir_calls_345 forensic test, and test-code uses in the #[cfg(test)] block — zero production call sites.
